<function=python>
<parameter=code>

    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)},{max(rows)},{max(cols)})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
